findings.title: No regression coverage for the audit cursor window behavior
findings.description: Current tests cover full audit log reads and compliance reporting, but not the cursor-based windowed path in readAuditLogWindowed. The false-positive path in BUG-001 can ship without a failing test.
findings.suggested_issue: Add a server-side test that performs multiple appendEditIntentAuditEvents calls within the same window and asserts the earlier get_rules event is still visible.

findings.title: No integration test for mixed MCP-event and ledger-entry tails
findings.description: There is test coverage for pre-commit orchestration and API client auth, but none for the case where .intent-ledger.jsonl ends with an mcp-event line before ledger-append runs. That leaves BUG-003 unguarded.
findings.snippet: function hasMatchingTailEntry(target: string, entry: HumanLedgerEntry): boolean {
findings.suggested_issue: Add a CLI test fixture where the ledger tail is an mcp-event and assert duplicate human entries are still suppressed.
